text: There was a boy who loved frogs. He loved how they jumped gracefully through the air. He loved how they blended with water. One day he got a frog friend. It lived in an old fountain pen. He fed it tiny bugs. Every evening he watched it swim. Once it stopped swimming. He checked everywhere. Nothing. It fell asleep. He got scared. He woke it. It blinked. Nothing. Maybe it was tired. He pushed it gently. It popped. It wasn't dead. He scooped it into a jar. He took it to school. Kids laughed. When he showed the frog he had schoolwork to do. The frog sat beside him. He scribbled words. The frog scribbled legs. He drew pictures. It croaked pretty. He loved animals. He always fed it worms. Now it could go live somewhere nice. Maybe a pond. Bye.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
